structured.name: End of charging process.
structured.objective: See ISO15118-1, use case Objective H1, page 44.
structured.description: See ISO15118-1, use case Description H1, page 44.
scenario:
See ISO15118-1, use case Description H1, Basic elementary use case description, first 5 bullets
and last 2 remarks, page
6. The EV driver unplugs the cable from the EV

7. The Charging Station sends a TransactionEventRequest with eventType eventType = Ended to
the CSMS.
structured.prerequisites: See ISO15118-1, use case Prerequisites H1, page 44.
structured.postconditions:
The CSMS has received all relevant information about the transaction.
See ISO15118-1, use case End Conditions H1, page 44.

requirements.precondition:
When configured to send meter data in the
TransactionEventRequest (eventType = Ended),
See: Meter Values - Configuration
requirements.definition:
The Charging Station SHALL add the configured measurands to
the optional meterValue field in the TransactionEventRequest
(eventType = Ended) sent to the CSMS to provide more details
about transaction usage. (Same as E08.FR.09)

requirements.precondition:
E15.FR.01
AND
The Charging Station is running low on memory
requirements.definition:
The Charging Station MAY drop meter data in the
TransactionEventRequest(eventType = Ended) message. (Same
as E06.FR.12)

When dropping meter data, the Charging Station SHALL drop
intermediate values first (2nd value, 4th value, 6th etc), not drop
the start and end values from the list. (Same as E06.FR.13)

requirements.precondition:
When TxStopPoint contains "Authorized" or
"PowerPathClosed" or "EnergyTransfer" AND
Charging Station has not yet sent a
TransactionEventRequest with triggerReason =
StopAuthorized when it receives a ISO 15118
SessionStopReq(Terminate) message from the
EV
requirements.definition:
Charging Station SHALL send a TransactionEventRequest
message with eventType = Ended and triggerReason =
StopAuthorized and stoppedReason = StoppedByEV to
inform the CSMS that the charging transaction has been stopped
(by the EV).

requirements.precondition:
When TxStopPoint does not contain
"Authorized" or "PowerPathClosed" or
"EnergyTransfer" AND
Charging Station has not yet sent a
TransactionEventRequest with triggerReason =
StopAuthorized when it receives a ISO 15118
SessionStopReq(Terminate) message from the
EV
requirements.definition:
Charging Station SHALL send a TransactionEventRequest
message with eventType = Updated and triggerReason =
StopAuthorized to inform the CSMS that the authorization
has ended.

chunks.content:
# E15 - End of charging process.

**Objective:** See ISO15118-1, use case Objective H1, page 44.

**Description:** See ISO15118-1, use case Description H1, page 44.

**Actors:** EV, Charging Station, EV Driver

**Scenario:**
See ISO15118-1, use case Description H1, Basic elementary use case description, first 5 bullets
and last 2 remarks, page
4.
6. The EV driver unplugs the cable from the EV
7. The Charging Station sends a TransactionEventRequest with eventType eventType = Ended to
the CSMS.

**Prerequisites:** See ISO15118-1, use case Prerequisites H1, page 44.

**Postconditions:** The CSMS has received all relevant information about the transaction.
See ISO15118-1, use case End Conditions H1, page 44.

# E15 - Requirements

**E15.FR.01**
Precondition: When configured to send meter data in the
TransactionEventRequest (eventType = Ended),
See: Meter Values - Configuration
The Charging Station SHALL add the configured measurands to
the optional meterValue field in the TransactionEventRequest
(eventType = Ended) sent to the CSMS to provide more details
about transaction usage. (Same as E08.FR.09)

**E15.FR.02**
Precondition: E15.FR.01
AND
The Charging Station is running low on memory
The Charging Station MAY drop meter data in the
TransactionEventRequest(eventType = Ended) message. (Same
as E06.FR.12)

**E15.FR.03**
Precondition: E15.FR.02
When dropping meter data, the Charging Station SHALL drop
intermediate values first (2nd value, 4th value, 6th etc), not drop
the start and end values from the list. (Same as E06.FR.13)

**E15.FR.04**
Precondition: When TxStopPoint contains "Authorized" or
"PowerPathClosed" or "EnergyTransfer" AND
Charging Station has not yet sent a
TransactionEventRequest with triggerReason =
StopAuthorized when it receives a ISO 15118
SessionStopReq(Terminate) message from the
EV
Charging Station SHALL send a TransactionEventRequest
message with eventType = Ended and triggerReason =
StopAuthorized and stoppedReason = StoppedByEV to
inform the CSMS that the charging transaction has been stopped
(by the EV).

**E15.FR.05**
Precondition: When TxStopPoint does not contain
"Authorized" or "PowerPathClosed" or
"EnergyTransfer" AND
Charging Station has not yet sent a
TransactionEventRequest with triggerReason =
StopAuthorized when it receives a ISO 15118
SessionStopReq(Terminate) message from the
EV
Charging Station SHALL send a TransactionEventRequest
message with eventType = Updated and triggerReason =
StopAuthorized to inform the CSMS that the authorization
has ended.
